headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for ecommerce operators who live in Shopify, Gorgias, email, and ops dashboards. It shows why agentic AI is moving fast, why computer‑use matters for real work, and how Super’s personal AI agents reuse a computer‑use cache to make repeated admin cheaper and more reliable than chat‑first tools.
